title: Spanish I: Foundations for Speaking
subtitle: SPAN-10 · A 3-week intensive
description: Go from zero to holding real, simple conversations in Spanish. A speaking-first foundations course built on the grammar that actually matters early: pronunciation, gender and articles, ser vs. estar, the present tense of regular and key irregular verbs, questions, negation, and how Spanish sentences are put together. Built around daily lectures, handwritten conjugation and copywork, spaced repetition, speaking drills, quizzes, and projects.

sections.title: Week 1: Sounds, People & the Verb To Be

lessons.title: Days 1 to 7: Pronunciation, Greetings, Nouns, Pronouns, Ser & Estar, Numbers
Days 8 to 14: -ar/-er/-ir Verbs, Questions, Negation, Adjectives, Tener, Ir
Days 15 to 21: Stem-Changing Verbs, Gustar, Time & Weather, Practical Speech, Commands
